projects.name: AgentGovernanceBootstrap
projects.description: Portable governance/bootstrap process and toolkit for LLM-agent-maintained repositories. Supplies discovery script, procedures, templates, and the self-describing AGENTS.md for this repo.

policy.code_changes: Run current automated verification before claiming completion.
policy.docs_only: Code verification is not required unless docs affect setup, commands, runtime behavior, generated files, or user-visible behavior.
policy.manual_behavior: Run the relevant manual check, smoke test, or playtest for behavior not covered by automation, or state clearly that it was not run.

verification.notes: No CI workflow files were detected by discovery in provider-executable paths with matching branch triggers. The unittest command is the explicit local verification entry point declared in AGENTS.md and docs/usage.md for changes to the script, tests, and copied content. Documentation-only changes use `git diff --check`. See AGENTS.md Verification section for the exact rule.

notes: This is the source repo for the bootstrap toolkit itself. Its AGENTS.md declares the active baseline files that define the process. The .agents/ layout was introduced by the 2026-06-10 self-migration.

2026-06-21: the repo's own self-application was brought current with the product — added a CLAUDE.md shim, committed .claude/commands/ operator wrappers and a .claude/settings.json re-ground hook, rewrote AGENTS.md to the product shape (Prime Invariants, Universal Invariants, Operator Requests, Session Startup), and archived closed decisions into docs/history/decisions-archive.md.
No suspected misplaced CI or branch mismatches were flagged.
